reviewChecklist: Does the feature feel like a governed evolution of the workbook rather than raw SharePoint list editing?
Can an estimator identify how to start, resume, validate, and hand off an estimate?
Are Commercial and Multifamily clearly the only MVP templates?
Is template migration clearly different from active project workbook import?
Are scratchpad items allowed but prevented from silently flowing downstream?
Does the bid leveling screen show decision support without implying award authority?
Does Handoff Preview clearly show blocking issues before freeze?
Are HB internal cost-code mappings visible and enforceable?
Are validation signals actionable from the source screen?
Are key screens compatible with SPFx/PCC shell constraints?
Can the grid workflow be planned for keyboard-heavy estimator use?
hardStops: Active project workbook import introduced in MVP
Sage or Procore writeback implied or implemented
HBI treated as pricing or award authority
Unresolved handoff errors allowed to freeze baseline
Browser-level horizontal overflow in SharePoint host
Required workflow only available through native SharePoint list editing
